best_resolution_reason: RS1 is the preferred strategy because it is the smallest and most localized modification. The process already contains the intended activity in the correct conditional branch, but its label does not match the requirement evidence. Renaming the existing activity restores full compliance without changing control flow, data flow, resource assignments, or the currently satisfied context requirements.
